Hemoglobin Electrophoresis 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/hemoglobin-electrophoresis/ 
Hemoglobin Electrophoresis 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is hemoglobin electrophoresis? 
Hemoglobin electrophoresis is a test that measures the different types of hemoglobin in the blood. It also checks for hemoglobinopathy, disorders involving abnormal types of hemoglobin. Hemoglobin is a protein in your red blood cells. It carries oxygen from your lungs to the rest of your body. There are a few
